/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libbwi_perception_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libbwi_perception_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/bwi_perception_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/bwi_perception_interface/msg/detail/dl_amcl_coords__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
